1234  execve("/usr/bin/testapp", ["testapp"], 0x7ffd... /* 24 vars */) = 0
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/ld.so.cache", O_RDONLY|O_CLOEXEC) = 3
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/lib64/libc.so.6", O_RDONLY|O_CLOEXEC) = 3
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/testapp.conf", O_RDONLY) = 3
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/var/run/testapp.pid", O_WRONLY|O_CREAT, 0644) = 4
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/dev/urandom", O_RDONLY) = 5
1234  socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP) = 6
1234  bind(6, {sa_family=AF_INET, sin_port=htons(8080), sin_addr=inet_addr("0.0.0.0")}, 16) = 0
1234  listen(6, 5) = 0
1234  socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM, IPPROTO_UDP) = 7
1234  bind(7, {sa_family=AF_INET, sin_port=htons(5353), sin_addr=inet_addr("0.0.0.0")}, 16) = 0
1234  socket(AF_UNIX, SOCK_STREAM|SOCK_CLOEXEC, 0) = 8
1234  bind(8, {sa_family=AF_UNIX, sun_path="/var/run/testapp/testapp.sock"}, 110) = 0
1234  socket(AF_UNIX, SOCK_DGRAM|SOCK_CLOEXEC, 0) = 9
1234  connect(9, {sa_family=AF_UNIX, sun_path="/dev/log"}, 110) = 0
1234  socket(AF_NETLINK, SOCK_RAW, NETLINK_ROUTE) = 10
1234  unlink("/var/run/testapp/testapp.sock") = 0
1234  chmod("/var/run/testapp", 0755) = 0
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/proc/self/status", O_RDONLY) = 3
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/sys/fs/cgroup/memory", O_RDONLY) = 3
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/dev/random", O_RDONLY) = 3
1234  shmget(IPC_PRIVATE, 4096, IPC_CREAT|0600) = 12345
1234  semget(IPC_PRIVATE, 1, IPC_CREAT|0600) = 67890
1234  msgget(IPC_PRIVATE, IPC_CREAT|0600) = 11111
1234  prlimit64(0, RLIMIT_NOFILE, {rlim_cur=65536, rlim_max=65536}, NULL) = 0
1234  prctl(PR_CAPBSET_READ, CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE) = 1
1234  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/nonexistent", O_RDONLY) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
1234  connect(11, {sa_family=AF_UNIX, sun_path="/var/run/dbus/system_bus_socket"}, 110) = 0
1234  +++ exited with 0 +++
